frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields valid; description 635 chars; allowed-tools hyphenated; composes_with all exist; owns.patterns meaningful.

description_quality.notes: 635 chars; starts with 'Produce'; 6 trigger phrases; FORBIDDEN and REQUIRED callouts make it distinctive.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 92 lines; three references all linked with when-to-read guidance.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; six-step process; forbidden list before required sections; closing reminder for emphasis.

coordination.notes: All 3 composes_with exist (grill-me, plan-builder, contract-author); Composition section names handoffs.

completeness.notes: All 3 reference files exist; worked examples and anti-patterns in references; full template provided.

anti_patterns.notes: MUST/FORBIDDEN justified as load-bearing rule; no hardcoded paths beyond conventional briefs/; no body↔reference duplication.

nits.item: AFK/HITL abbreviations used without expansion on first occurrence
nits.fix: Expand on first use: 'AFK (Away From Keyboard) / HITL (Human In The Loop) classification'

nits.item: Forbidden rule appears 3+ times (body §Forbidden List, §Key Interfaces, §Closing Reminder, references/brief-format.md §Forbidden) — borderline triple-mention
nits.fix: Optional: trim §Closing Reminder if you trust the reader; current pattern works for emphasis

nits.item: Anti-pattern code block in brief-format.md could use inline '# WRONG' comment for scanability
nits.fix: Add inline marker so casual readers see it's an anti-example
